studies.title: Investigation of a positive care effect of the NichtraucherHelden App (Medicine): Implementation of a Randomized Controlled Trial (RCT).

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the NichtraucherHelden-App, as evidenced by the repeated mention of the app's name in the title, full text, and trial registration. The study evaluates the effectiveness of the NichtraucherHelden-App in smoking cessation.

_classification.reason: Keyword match: 3 RCT indicators vs 1 RWE indicators.
